title: Institute Groups
description: Manage trusts, societies, and chains that operate institutes.
noGroupsDescription: Create your first institute group to organize institutes.
name: Group Name
nameDescription: The legal or common name this group is known by.
codeDescription: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only. Used in URLs and APIs.
codeHelpBody: A unique slug that identifies this group across Roviq. It cannot be changed after creation, so choose a stable value such as dps-society or ryan-trust.
typeDescription: Legal structure under which this group operates.
registrationStateDescription: Optional. State where this group is legally registered.
contactDescription: How administrators and auditors can reach this group.
addressDescription: Primary correspondence address for the group.

typeDescriptions.TRUST: Registered under the Indian Trusts Act.
typeDescriptions.SOCIETY: Registered under the Societies Registration Act.
typeDescriptions.CHAIN: A branded chain operating multiple institutes.
typeDescriptions.FRANCHISE: A franchise model with franchisor and franchisees.

createGroupSubtitle: Register a new trust, society, chain, or franchise that operates one or more institutes.
deleteConfirm: This will remove {count} institutes from this group. Are you sure?
draftRestoredBody: We recovered a draft you started earlier. Use Clear Draft to start fresh.

validation.nameMax: Group name must be 200 characters or fewer.
validation.codeFormat: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
validation.codeMax: Short code must be 50 characters or fewer.
validation.registrationNumberMax: Registration number must be 100 characters or fewer.

accessDenied: You do not have permission to manage institute groups.
codeDuplicate: This short code is already taken. Choose another.
